text: Cynthia Koons takes over as Health Editor at the Wall Street Journal
Anjalee Khemlani is now a Contributor for Forbes
Joyce Famikinwa hired to replace Brock Turner at Modern Healthcare
Gabe Perna retiring at the end of the month
Rebecca Torrence leaves Business Insider for Bloomberg to cover VC and startups
Emma Beavins retires from her role as staff writer at Fierce Healthcare
The Washington Post lays off approx. one-third of staff, impacting over 300 journalists
Emma Beavins bows out with a story examining the Coalition for Health AI (CHAI) & assurance labs
Rebecca Torrence begins covering AI, health tech, and emerging tech at Bloomberg
Julie Wernau & Melanie Evans join Tradeoffs podcast from WSJ
Teddy Rosenbluth joins NYT Well section as Health Reporter
Trisha Thadani transitions to health beat at The Washington Post
Victoria Knight (Axios Vitals) departs Axios health care policy beat
Tim Baysinger (Axios Communicators) leaves Axios media beat
Maia Anderson has returned from personal leave at Healthcare Brew
Stefanie Ilgenfritz departs WSJ after 35-year health journalism career
